title: Service Workflow v2
description: Defines the ordered sequence of steps that constitute an administrative procedure's execution lifecycle. Embedded in the root AdministrativeProcedure record. The execution-mapping satellite schema maps each stepId to concrete n8n actions.

schemaVersion.description: Semantic version of the workflow schema used to produce this object (e.g. '2.0.0').

version.description: Version of this workflow definition within the procedure's lifecycle (e.g. 'v2', 'v1.3'). Incremented when steps are added, removed, or reordered.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this workflow was generated or last normalized.

generator.description: Identifier of the tool or pipeline that produced this workflow object (e.g. 'xls-normalizer-v1.2'). Used for debugging normalization issues.

steps.description: Ordered list of workflow steps. Must contain at least one step. Steps MUST have unique, strictly increasing order values (BR-002, BR-003).

stepId.description: Stable unique identifier for this step within the workflow. Used as the linking key by the execution-mapping satellite. Pattern: step_ followed by lowercase alphanumerics, hyphens, or underscores (e.g. 'step_verification_docs').

order.description: Execution sequence position, starting at 1. All order values within a workflow MUST be unique and strictly increasing (BR-002, BR-003).

label.description: Human-readable name of this step. MUST NOT be a placeholder (e.g. 'Étape sans libellé') in the Public API Profile (BR-004). Should describe the action clearly (e.g. 'Vérification administrative du dossier').

description.description: Optional detailed description of what happens during this step. Provides additional context for portal display and human reviewers.

actor.description: Who performs this step. 'citizen': the applicant acts. 'business': a legal entity acts. 'administration': the institution acts. 'mixed': both sides act. 'unknown': could not be determined — sets the 'unknown_actor' quality flag.

channel.description: How this step is performed. 'offline': physical presence or paper. 'online': fully digital. 'hybrid': supports both. 'unknown': could not be determined — sets the 'unknown_channel' quality flag.

stepType.description: Semantic classification of the step. Drives execution action mapping in the execution-mapping satellite. 'submission': case intake. 'verification': document or eligibility check. 'inspection': physical on-site visit. 'payment': fee collection. 'instruction': delivering guidance or a pre-filled form to the citizen. 'approval': internal authority sign-off. 'decision': final determination (grant/reject/defer). 'notification': outbound communication to the citizen. 'delivery': handing over the output document. 'archival': closing and storing the case. 'other': use 'unknown_step_type' quality flag if genuinely unclassifiable.

requiresPayment.description: Explicit flag indicating that this step involves a payment transaction. Used to enforce BR-010 (fee model must not be 'unknown' when true).

documentsIn.description: List of documentTypeCode values that are consumed (verified, checked) at this step. References codes defined in documentsRequired.

documentsOut.description: List of documentTypeCode values that are produced (issued, stamped) at this step.

slaDays.description: Maximum number of working days allocated for this step. Null if not defined. Used for SLA monitoring and escalation in the execution engine.

confidence.description: Normalization confidence for this step's data. 'auto_high': extracted with high confidence, no review needed. 'auto_medium': extracted with moderate confidence, review recommended. 'manual_required': could not be reliably extracted — human review is required before publication.

sourceText.description: Original text fragment from the source document that this step was extracted from. Preserved for traceability and manual review.

processingLocation.description: Where this step is physically or organizationally processed. Provides more granular location than the procedure-level owner.

ministry.description: Ministry where this step is processed, if different from the procedure owner.

entity.description: Entity or agency responsible for this step.

serviceUnit.description: Service unit responsible for this step.

office.description: Specific office or counter (e.g. 'Guichet 3 — Accueil dossiers').

channelPoint.description: Named access point for this step (e.g. 'portail.gov.mg/soumettre', 'Commune de résidence').

notes.description: Free-text notes about the processing location (e.g. opening hours, special instructions).

responsibleUnit.description: Short label identifying the unit responsible for executing this step. Simplified alternative to processingLocation when full breakdown is not available.

handoffTo.description: Identifier of the unit or actor that receives the case after this step completes. Documents inter-unit handoffs for process mapping.

qualityFlags.description: List of quality issues detected on this step during normalization. Blocking flags prevent Public API publication (BR-009). See flag definitions below.

transitions.description: Outgoing conditional transitions from this step. Models branching logic (GovStack Exclusive Gateway equivalent). If absent or empty, execution proceeds to the next step by order value (default sequential flow). If defined, the first matching condition determines the next step; a transition with no condition acts as the default/fallback path.

transitionId.description: Stable unique identifier for this transition. Pattern: trans_ followed by lowercase alphanumerics, hyphens, or underscores (e.g. 'trans_approved', 'trans_rejected').

label.description: Human-readable label for this transition path (e.g. 'Approuvé', 'Rejeté', 'Complément requis').

condition.description: Expression evaluated against the step output to determine if this transition fires (e.g. 'output.decision == approved'). Null or absent means this is the default fallback transition.

targetStepId.description: stepId of the next step to execute if this transition fires. Use the special value 'END' to terminate the workflow instance from this point.

sourceRaw.description: Full raw text of the workflow source as extracted from the original document (XLS row, PDF section, etc.). Preserved verbatim for traceability and re-normalization.

normalizationConfidence.description: Overall confidence level for the entire workflow normalization. Reflects the worst-case confidence across all steps. 'manual_required' blocks Public API publication (BR-008 via reviewStatus).

reviewStatus.description: Review and publication readiness status. 'approved_auto': normalization confidence was high enough for automatic approval — publishable in Public API Profile. 'review_required': a human reviewer must inspect before publication — valid in Internal Profile only. 'manual_required': critical issues prevent automated processing — valid in Internal Profile only. Only 'approved_auto' satisfies BR-008 for Public API publication.

defaultProcessingLocation.description: Default processing location applied to steps that do not specify their own processingLocation. Steps with their own processingLocation override this default.

serviceUnit.description: Default service unit for step processing.

notes.description: Notes about the default processing location.

source.description: Provenance metadata identifying the source file and parser that produced this workflow object.

sourceFile.description: Filename or path of the source document (e.g. 'procedures_MID_2025.xlsx').

sourceRowId.description: Row or record identifier within the source file (e.g. 'row_142', 'sheet:Autorisation:row:14').

parserVersion.description: Version of the normalization parser that produced this object (e.g. '1.4.2').
